title: str_replace_editor
description: Precise file editing tool. Supports create, str_replace, view, and undo_edit operations.

path.description: Absolute path to the target file.

old_str.description: The exact string to be replaced. Required for 'str_replace' command.

new_str.description: The string to replace old_str with. Required for 'str_replace' and 'create' commands.
